steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Count the relevant faces, dimensions, or scale factor before setting up equations. Lengths scale by $k$, areas by $k^2$, and volumes by $k^3$; for boxes and prisms, write the needed face or volume formula directly.

steps.title: Convert the linear measurement to squared
steps.content: To convert area units, the conversion factor must be squared. Since 1 mile = 1,760 yards: $$(1,760)^2 = 3,097,600 \text{ square yards per square mile}$$

steps.title: Divide the area to find square miles
steps.content: Divide the town's area by the conversion factor: $$\frac{11,646,976}{3,097,600} = 3.76 \text{ square miles}$$ That matches Choice C — $3.76$.
